See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 9890 => 'Irancell', 9891 => 'IR-MCI', 9892 => 'Rightel', 9893 => 'Irancell', 98931 => 'MTCE', 98932 => 'Taliya', 98934 => 'TeleKish', 98990 => 'IR-MCI', 98991 => 'IR-MCI', 98994 => 'IR-MCI', 98996 => 'IR-MCI', 989981 => 'Shatel Mobile', 989982 => 'Shatel Mobile', 9899900 => 'LOTUSTEL', 9899902 => 'IR-MCI', 989991 => 'Irancell', 989998 => 'Rightel', 9899996 => 'Rightel', 9899997 => 'Rightel', 9899998 => 'Rightel', 9899999 => 'Rightel', ];
